description_long: This is a rustic, bulbous clay vase with a wide, flared mouth and a rounded body. The surface is matte and unglazed, showing a natural earthy brown color with subtle variations and some visible textural roughness. There are two small protruding nubs on the body, and a single looped handle is attached to one side. A large, irregular opening is present on one side of the body, suggesting either damage or a unique design feature. The overall form is asymmetrical, with the mouth slightly tilted and the body showing hand-crafted imperfections. The vase appears aged, with some surface discoloration and signs of wear.
description: A rustic, brown clay vase with a wide flared mouth, a looped handle, and a large irregular opening on one side. The surface is matte, rough, and shows signs of age and wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flared mouth, rounded body, and looped handle on the left side, with two small nubs visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the large, irregular opening on the right side of the vase and the tilted mouth.
description_view_2: The large opening is most prominent from this view, revealing the hollow interior and the handle on the far side.
description_view_3: Back view shows the rounded body with a single nub and no visible handle or opening.
